{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Monarch-level construct
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|True [[Monarch]]-level constructs are extremely rare.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
